name: docs-participant
description: Copilot Chat Participant that reviews branch changes and updates project documentation via interactive diffs.

chatParticipants.name: docs
chatParticipants.description: Review branch changes and update project documentation

commands.name: review
commands.description: Scan all project docs and update stale ones based on branch changes

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update specific documentation files (attach files with #)

commands.name: staleness
commands.description: Report which docs are stale without making changes

disambiguation.description: The user wants to review, update, or check staleness of project documentation based on recent code changes.
examples: Which docs are outdated after my changes?
Update the README for the new API endpoint
Sync documentation with code changes on this branch
Check if ARCHITECTURE.md is still accurate
Review all project docs for staleness
